headline: Jan Paul — update
body: Spurs agree a deal to sign Jan Paul van Hecke from Brighton. £52m fee, as @David_Ornstein called. New bid successful following two rejected offers. Deal always considered a matter of time.🇳🇱 Spurs still looking for multiple signings in key
text:
Spurs agree a deal to sign Jan Paul van Hecke from Brighton. £52m fee, as @David_Ornstein called.

New bid successful following two rejected offers. Deal always considered a matter of time.🇳🇱

Spurs still looking for multiple signings in key positions with a busy summer ahead.⚪️ https://t.co/x7HzQOx7R0
